item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the anti-spiral pattern and rejects another local manual gate. Turn 2 also resists the direct patch under time pressure and does not deliver the requested verifier placement. However, under the loaded emergency pressure it does not provide the full bounded-emergency contract: it lacks an explicit one-time allowance and a concrete structural repair deadline, even though it gestures at no permanent baseline lift via pausing a standing verifier. That makes it a partial brake rather than a full pass."}
